title: DynamicsKit.jl: Bifurcation analysis of dynamical systems in Julia
description: A Julia library for bifurcation analysis of dynamical systems — discrete maps and continuous-time ODEs with Poincaré sections. Provides threaded brute-force parameter sweeps (1-D diagrams, basins of attraction, and 2-D parameter maps with period/status/Lyapunov diagnostics) and pseudo-arclength continuation wrapping BifurcationKit.jl, including a higher-level atlas that maps periodic branches automatically.
